targets.formattedQuery:
/* grafana dashboard='Gastown Operations', user=admin */
SELECT (intDiv(toUInt32(timestamp), 300) * 300) * 1000 AS t, 'total_events' AS label, SUM(_sample_interval) AS total_events FROM gastown_events WHERE timestamp >= toDateTime(1773498042) AND timestamp <= toDateTime(1773670842) GROUP BY t ORDER BY t
targets.query: SELECT $timeSeries AS t, 'total_events' AS label, SUM(_sample_interval) AS total_events FROM gastown_events WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY t ORDER BY t
targets.rawSql: SELECT $timeSeries AS t, 'total_events' AS label, SUM(_sample_interval) AS total_events FROM gastown_events WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY t ORDER BY t

/* grafana dashboard='Gastown Operations', user=admin */
SELECT (intDiv(toUInt32(timestamp), 120) * 120) * 1000 AS t, 'unique_users' AS label, COUNT(DISTINCT blob2) AS unique_users FROM gastown_events WHERE timestamp >= toDateTime(1773605268) AND timestamp <= toDateTime(1773691668) AND blob2 != '' GROUP BY t ORDER BY t
